title: Minimum Number of Operations to Make All Array Elements Equal to 1
titleCn: 使数组所有元素变成 1 的最少操作次数

testcases.input: nums = [2,6,3,4] Output: 4 Explanation: We can do the following operations: - Choose index i = 2 and replace nums[2] with gcd(3,4) = 1. Now we have nums = [2,6,1,4]. - Choose index i = 1 and replace nums[1] with gcd(6,1) = 1. Now we have nums = [2,1,1,4]. - Choose index i = 0 and replace nums[0] with gcd(2,1) = 1. Now we have nums = [1,1,1,4]. - Choose index i = 2 and replace nums[3] with gcd(1,4) = 1. Now we have nums = [1,1,1,1].
testcases.expectedOutput: 4 Explanation: We can do the following operations: - Choose index i = 2 and replace nums[2] with gcd(3,4) = 1. Now we have nums = [2,6,1,4]. - Choose index i = 1 and replace nums[1] with gcd(6,1) = 1. Now we have nums = [2,1,1,4]. - Choose index i = 0 and replace nums[0] with gcd(2,1) = 1. Now we have nums = [1,1,1,4]. - Choose index i = 2 and replace nums[3] with gcd(1,4) = 1. Now we have nums = [1,1,1,1].

testcases.input: nums = [2,10,6,14] Output: -1 Explanation: It can be shown that it is impossible to make all the elements equal to 1.
testcases.expectedOutput: -1 Explanation: It can be shown that it is impossible to make all the elements equal to 1.
